items.headline: This Date in Baseball - Zack Greinke became 5th pitcher in MLB history to K 1,000 different batters
items.description:
May 13
1911 — Detroit’s Ty Cobb hit his first grand slam. After six innings, the Tigers led the Red Sox, 10-1. Boston came back to win the game 13-11 in 10 innings.

items.headline: What might LeBron James do next? He has plenty of options for next season and beyond
items.description:
LeBron James has options.
He could stay with the Los Angeles Lakers. He could decide to join another team. He could even retire and end the longest career in NBA history. He knows all this.
